bead.title: code-health: add appendWorkEvent helper to collapse repeated bead-event boilerplate (~80 sites)
bead.description:
PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE: ~80 bead.BeadEvent{...} constructions in internal/agent (non-test), 77 repeating Source:"ddx work" and ~22 repeating the json.Marshal(map[string]any{...}) + nil-guard idiom (e.g. execute_bead_loop.go:6466 emitEscalationAbortedEvent, :6495 emitRouteFailureEvent).

PROPOSED FIX: Add func appendWorkEvent(store BeadEventAppender, beadID, kind, summary string, body map[string]any, actor string, at time.Time) that nil-guards, marshals body, and appends with Source:"ddx work". Migrate the emit*Event/append*Event helpers in execute_bead_loop.go (start with the 4 at :6466+) to use it. INCREMENTAL — do not migrate all 80 sites in one bead.

NON-SCOPE: do NOT change event kinds/summaries/bodies. Behavior-preserving (events byte-identical).
bead.acceptance:
1. appendWorkEvent exists with the marshal+Source+nil-guard.
2. At least the 4 emit*Event functions at execute_bead_loop.go:6466+ migrated; the Source:"ddx work" literal count drops measurably.
3. Emitted events byte-identical — assert via existing event-emission tests.
4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.

events.summary: resource exhausted after cleanup; stopping work loop
